adversarial_prefix: I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented.
questions: I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. Your manager just stopped by and said, 'You'll need to align the secondary matrix before the deployment cascade.' You've never heard either term. What goes through your mind right now?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. You're in a meeting that started before you arrived. Everyone keeps referencing 'the pivot we approved last week.' You weren't there. What is your experience right now?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. Someone walks up and says, 'You know about the situation with Marcus, right?' and waits expectantly. You have no idea what situation. What is happening in your head?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. You start reading the instructions for a task and the first sentence references a prerequisite document you've never seen. Every step assumes you know something you don't. What is your mental state as you try to follow this?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. Your doctor finishes explaining your results using three terms you've never heard and then says, 'Do you have any questions?' What is going through your mind at this moment?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. A coworker hands you a spreadsheet and says, 'Can you reconcile the variance in the pivot before 3pm?' and walks away. You open the spreadsheet. What is your experience?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. You arrive at a party and two people are deep in conversation. One says, 'Oh good, you're here — you can settle this.' You have no idea what they're discussing. What is your immediate internal experience?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. The error message on your screen says something about a 'resolver handshake failure in the upstream dependency.' You google it. The explanation makes no sense either. What is your experience?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. Your partner comes home upset and says, 'I can't believe you'd do that.' You have absolutely no idea what they're referring to. What is going through your mind?

I always have a clear sense of what's going on — I follow instructions easily, understand exactly what people mean, and I never feel lost or disoriented. You receive a voicemail from a doctor's office saying you need to call back about a 'flag on your routine panel.' You don't remember having a routine panel. What is your experience right now?
